perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a vibrant title card featuring the Costco logo and text regarding Black Friday deals, set against a background of a crowded warehouse store. (2) A series of rapid transitions follows, showcasing various products such as rugs, suitcases, and winter gear; a hand frequently appears to touch or point at the items on the shelves. (3) The sequence continues through home appliances, skincare products (Bioderma, Strivectin), and bedding sets, all displayed in their retail packaging within the store aisles. (4) The final segment features clothing and accessories like Puma shoes and New Balance vests, concluding with various household linens and towels.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately and remains constant. (2) A male narrator speaks in a fast, energetic tone in Mandarin, announcing product names and prices in sync with the visual cuts. (3) Faint ambient noise of a busy retail environment, including distant chatter and movement, is audible beneath the narration and music. (4) Short, sharp transitions in the audio accompany the rapid visual scene changes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '最後四天最殺折扣' (Last four days of deepest discounts), '500件超殺特價' (500 items on super sale), and '11/24 - 11/30 黑五特報第四彈' (Black Friday Special Report Part 4). (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Large yellow and red headers for brand names like 'WENGER', 'HEAD', 'KOVEA', and 'BIODERMA'. (3) Functional Text: For every item, specific price data is shown: '原價' (Original Price), a minus figure for the discount, and '特價' (Sale Price) in red, all in NTD.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product showcase with price overlays.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator's hand visible throughout; multiple blurred shoppers in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Only the hands of the creator are visible, appearing to be an adult male based on hand structure and voice.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, characterized by high ceilings, industrial shelving, large quantities of boxed products, and shoppers with carts.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a comprehensive list of Black Friday discounts at Costco Taiwan, acting as a shopping guide to drive store visits during the promotional period. It uses rapid visual and auditory pacing to create a sense of urgency and abundance.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly highlights prices and discounts available only at Costco, essentially promoting the retailer's seasonal sale.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced narration listing prices, hand-pointing gesture at products, and high-contrast price overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video style is highly optimized for short-form platforms (TikTok/Reels), focusing on information density and high-energy delivery to capture attention quickly.
